languages.text: Плазменный контур оружия пылает изумрудным светом. Благодаря гению Эоганна, чудовищную силу энтропии ксеносов можно обернуть против них самих.
The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.
languages.original_text: Плазменный контур оружия пылает изумрудным светом. Благодаря гению Эоганна, чудовищную силу энтропии ксеносов можно обернуть против них самих.

traits.locale_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.
The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.
The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.
The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

languages.text: Der Plasmakern der Waffe erstrahlt in einem smaragdfarbenen Licht. Dank Eogunns Genie kann die monströse Kraft der Entropie, über die Xenos verfügen, gegen sie gerichtet werden.
languages.original_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

traits.locale_text: Der Plasmakern der Waffe erstrahlt in einem smaragdfarbenen Licht. Dank Eogunns Genie kann die monströse Kraft der Entropie, über die Xenos verfügen, gegen sie gerichtet werden.

languages.text: Le plasma de l'arme brille d'une lumière émeraude. Grâce au génie d'Eogunn, la monstrueuse puissance d'entropie des xénos peut être retournée contre eux.
languages.original_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

traits.locale_text: Le plasma de l'arme brille d'une lumière émeraude. Grâce au génie d'Eogunn, la monstrueuse puissance d'entropie des xénos peut être retournée contre eux.

languages.text: El núcleo de plasma del arma brilla con luz esmeralda. El genio de Eogunn permite volver el monstruoso poder entrópico del arma contra los xenos que la poseen.
languages.original_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

traits.locale_text: El núcleo de plasma del arma brilla con luz esmeralda. El genio de Eogunn permite volver el monstruoso poder entrópico del arma contra los xenos que la poseen.

languages.text: Silahın plazma çekirdeği, zümrüt ışığıyla parlıyor. Eogunn'un dehası sayesinde zenoların sahip olduğu o korkunç entropi gücü, kendi aleyhlerine çevrilebiliyor.
languages.original_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

traits.locale_text: Silahın plazma çekirdeği, zümrüt ışığıyla parlıyor. Eogunn'un dehası sayesinde zenoların sahip olduğu o korkunç entropi gücü, kendi aleyhlerine çevrilebiliyor.

languages.text: 这把武器的等离子核心迸发着翠绿色的光芒。在伊奥贡的天才改造下，异形所掌握的那股可怕的熵之力，如今可以反噬到它们自己头上了。
languages.original_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

traits.locale_text: 这把武器的等离子核心迸发着翠绿色的光芒。在伊奥贡的天才改造下，异形所掌握的那股可怕的熵之力，如今可以反噬到它们自己头上了。

languages.text: 武器のプラズマコアはエメラルド色の光を放つ。エオグンの天才によって、異種族が持つ巨大なエントロピーの力は、彼ら自身に返される。
languages.original_text: The weapon's plasma core blazes with emerald light. By Eogunn's genius, the monstrous power of entropy the xenos possess can be turned back upon them.

traits.locale_text: 武器のプラズマコアはエメラルド色の光を放つ。エオグンの天才によって、異種族が持つ巨大なエントロピーの力は、彼ら自身に返される。
